fields.name: article
fields.label: Article
fields.comments: The KB article this reputation record belongs to (1-to-1)

fields.name: reputation_score
fields.label: Reputation Score
fields.comments: Clamped 0-100. Starting baseline is 50. Driven by nightly ReputationJob.

fields.name: positive_sessions
fields.label: Positive Sessions
fields.comments: Cumulative count of sessions classified as summary_satisfied or drilled_down

fields.name: negative_sessions
fields.label: Negative Sessions
fields.comments: Cumulative count of sessions classified as result_failed, full_failure, or summary_rejected

fields.name: last_calculated
fields.label: Last Calculated
fields.comments: Timestamp of the last nightly reputation recalculation run

fields.name: previous_score
fields.label: Previous Score
fields.comments: Score from the prior calculation cycle; used for trend reporting

fields.name: score_trend
fields.label: Score Trend
fields.comments: Derived from delta between reputation_score and previous_score

fields.name: total_sessions
fields.label: Total Sessions
fields.comments: Total sessions involving this article; denominator for success rate

fields.name: first_click_success_rate
fields.label: First Click Success Rate
fields.comments: Percentage of sessions where clicking this article did NOT result in a return-to-search
